---
title: "Minyoung So"
image: Minyoung So_Profile Photo.jpeg
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/minyoungso/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/biosoaji
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:sominy@umich.edu
---

Pharmaceutical R&D Scientist (Ph.D.)\
Project Management Professional (PMP)$^{\textregistered}$\
Aspiring Biostatistician\

Specialty:  \
AI-based Drug Discovery and Development\
Rare and Neurodegenerative Diseases and Mitochondrial Pathophysiology\
